scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,green "bun run dev:backend" "bun run dev:web"
scripts.dev:web: bun run sync:env && bun run --cwd apps/web dev
scripts.build:web: bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bun run --cwd apps/web build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd packages/shared lint && bun run --cwd packages/backend lint && bun run --cwd apps/web lint
scripts.clean: bun run --cwd packages/shared clean && bun run --cwd packages/backend clean && bun run --cwd apps/web clean
